description: فحص إمكانية الاتصال بـ Chrome عبر CDP
command_preview: Write-Host '=== Check Chrome Debug Port ==='; $debugPort = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9222 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($debugPort) { Write-Host 'CDP port 9222 is OPEN'; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:9222/json' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 50 } else { Write-Host 'CDP port 9222 NOT open. Checking other debug ports...'; $ports = @(9222,9223,9224,9225); foreach($p in $ports) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($c) { Write-Host "Port $p is open" } }; Write-Host '=== Chrome command line check ==='; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='chrome.exe'" | Select-Object -First 1 CommandLine | Format-List }
output:
=== Check Chrome Debug Port ===
CDP port 9222 NOT open. Checking other debug ports...
=== Chrome command line check ===


CommandLine : "C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe" 
              "--user-data-dir=C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data" 
              --profile-directory=Default https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/0/add-a-place
